quotes.text: I'm looking for something other than ChatGPT. it has a token base fee system and I'm very suspicious about how it interacts with me. As a software developer, I use ChatGPT to assist in debugging code, understanding complex algorithms, generating simple code blocks, etc. I find that ChatGPT loves repeating itself ratcheting up token use with things that haven't changed. It's continually making errors that I have repeatedly requested it to give special focus and attention. I wonder if they're steering the algorithm for financial gain.
quotes.author: @deenlcore

quotes.text: The day and age of proprietary ownership of our own styles or intellectual content is also light-years away in the rear-view mirror. Soon humans will no longer have to worry about being creative. We came all the way from painting on cave walls to AI "collaboration", and now will have plenty of more time to goon over our "creations".
quotes.author: @marshallodom1388

quotes.text: and it also puts a lot of nonsense in your text (stuff that isn't related to the subject of the text)
quotes.author: @countdooku9521

quotes.text: GPT human is garbage, it says it can humanise in a lot of languages but a lot of times it converts your text in english instead of french for example. Wich makes you regenerate the text and spend credits again and again...
quotes.author: @countdooku9521

quotes.text: I've been using Clever AI Humanizer lately, and it seriously makes AI text sound natural and smooth. If you want your content to feel more real and human, give it a try!

quotes.text: real talk stop paying for those sketch humanizers. Clever AI Humanizer is the actual cheat code for 2025. It literally always passes the zero-detectors. Slayyyy

quotes.text: Pray your clients don't see the video. Thank you bro.

quotes.text: Few months ago u said ai can't create a perfect copy and we need to be best at copywriting ourselves,and now a beginner can come in and use chatgpt to its maximum potential and create a better copy. Is it really worthwhile to learn copywriting if ai is adapting this faast?
quotes.author: @moneyaddict88

quotes.text: If chatgpt is able to do everything ,why are copywriters needed at all? What if companies just use these prompts and ask chatgpt to make a good copy for them? I'm myself into learning copywriting these days though
quotes.author: @muskandeepkaur7145

quotes.text: im tired of outreaching with no replies
quotes.author: @mahad_daa

quotes.text: Tyson, got a question. But does robot truly knows the feeling of real human? Because human desire or pain points could be very detailed. Thanks for value a lot!
quotes.author: @elvis000

quotes.text: This is fantastic. The only issue I have is a lot of clients want human content because they want to know the freelancer actually did some work and didn't just use AI. Also, 'human' content ranks higher on Google. Can you create a video on how you transform AI content to bypass AI detection software. Personally, I find this takes a lot of time, and because you're constantly moving words around the quality also tends to suffer. Thanks.
quotes.author: @Siacourage

quotes.text: Hi, i would just like to say a big thank you. I purchased your library of 300 prompts and have used a few. But for me the best of the best is this copywriting prompt!! Mind Blown!! i added in a bit more to unfluff and added some perplexity and WOW!!! it reads like some real professional copy for the company i work for. It has raised a few eye brows from the board of directors, which is nice, so yeah big big shout out to you!!!
quotes.author: @darndarn99

quotes.text: frankly i dont think the copy is compelling at all
quotes.author: @jasonjason8639

quotes.text: That copy does not motivate me to purchase anything. Does not tell me how its going to help me. It does not tell me any example of whats in it for me
quotes.author: @lillianave

quotes.text: Copywriting is too much of a creative process to be replaced by AI. AI is good in math, logic in something has determined rules and boundaries, its good in non-divergent thinking. And you need the complete opposite for copywriting.
quotes.author: @SuperLari1234

quotes.text: I create grand slam $100M offers and sales copies for different types of businesses on Fiverr using AI. Still, the irony is that local business owners dont understand the value of copy written with AI. And thats right they cant judge if it is a good copy or not. and give bad reviews saying the writer is using AI. Meanwhile, online business owners are totally the opposite.
quotes.author: @hashamshafqat

quotes.text: AI Sounds robotic always when i try to use it for some Sabri Subi Mails level of copywriting ... & i only reached his style when i tried to talk about my own experiences, thoughts going trough those hardships that i created a product to solve those exact problems i faced .. AI will never beat human creativity in my opinion
quotes.author: @yamix.brands

quotes.text: At best AI will be like a hammer. Its not just gonna build an entire house for you. Until I see it, I truly dont buy into any notion that AI will take over.
quotes.author: @highsol222

quotes.text: You need a soul to be a good writer. Human creativity will never, ever be annexed by a computer.
quotes.author: @L_R_Parker

quotes.text: I just prefer to not use AI on principle. Does it yield higher leverage in terms of speed, sure. Does that automatically mean it creates better copy? No.
